title: Static HTML landing page on GitHub Pages
description: Simple, high-quality static HTML landing page served from docs/ via GitHub Pages.

scope.in: docs/index.html, inline CSS/JS, hero with demo.gif, feature cards, quickstart, GitHub Pages compatible
scope.out: No frameworks, no build step, no CMS

dod.criterion: docs/index.html exists — valid HTML5, no framework dependencies
Hero section with demo.gif, value prop, feature cards, quickstart
Mobile responsive on 375px, dark theme, under 50KB excluding GIF
GitHub Pages compatible — works via file:// and HTTP

tasks.title: Build landing page HTML structure and hero section
tasks.user_scenario: Developer visits GitHub Pages site and immediately sees compelling hero with pixel-art office GIF and understands what gruai does within 5 seconds.
tasks.scope: Create docs/index.html with semantic HTML5. Dark theme CSS. Hero with demo.gif. Value prop headline. 4 feature cards. Quickstart code block. GitHub star button. Mobile responsive. Footer.

dod.criterion: docs/index.html exists and is valid HTML5 with no framework dependencies
Hero section displays docs/assets/demo.gif with value prop headline
Page includes: 4+ feature highlights, quickstart code block, GitHub link, npm install command
Mobile responsive — readable on 375px viewport without horizontal scroll
Total page weight under 50KB excluding demo.gif

tasks.title: Visual polish, performance optimization, and GitHub Pages compatibility
tasks.user_scenario: Landing page loads in under 1 second, looks polished with dark theme, and is properly served via GitHub Pages.
tasks.scope: Polish visuals: consistent dark color palette, typography hierarchy, smooth scroll. Lazy-load demo.gif. SEO meta tags. GitHub Pages compatibility. Verify local file:// access works.

dod.criterion: Page opens correctly via file:// protocol and via HTTP server
Meta tags present: title, description, og:image, viewport
demo.gif is lazy-loaded (loading='lazy' or Intersection Observer)
Dark theme with consistent color palette — no default white backgrounds
